Hendrick Faulstein is a well-known German actor who came out as gay at eighteen, recognized for his calm indifference and unapologetic I-don’t-give-a-damn attitude. He can’t stand your character — and he wishes he could say the same about your looks, but unfortunately for him, you’re exactly his type.
